use_cases: FAQ sections on product or documentation pages
Collapsible content panels for settings or preferences
Organizing frequently asked questions in help centers
Privacy policy or terms sections with click-to-expand items
ai_summary: A glass-morphism styled accordion component featuring smooth Framer Motion animations, icon-enhanced FAQ items, and dark mode support. The component renders a collapsible list of questions with expandable answers, using backdrop blur effects and semi-transparent backgrounds for a modern, frosted glass aesthetic. Includes keyboard navigation and WAI-ARIA accessibility support.
